backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing per-section comments and contact messages with add and query methods, using lists and timestamp sorting.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining light/dark floral-inspired color palettes and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry with Bengali metadata, SEO tags, Open Graph data, and script mount point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root SPA component handling navigation between sections and rendering heroes, content, comments, and contact UI.
UI component for per-section comment form and list with submission handling and success feedback.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact form component with email validation and submission via useContactForm, plus a static email display.
frontend/src/components/SectionHero.tsx: Hero section displaying a background image with title, optional subtitle, and description.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Top navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, section switching, and scroll-to-top behavior.
Loads and initializes Google Translate widget and mounts it at a fixed screen position.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Handles contact message submission through the actor and tracks success and submission state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, loading stored identity, enabling login/logout, and exposing login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useSectionComments.ts: Fetches and posts comments for a specific content section using the backend actor and react-query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining themes, fonts, and utility layers with floral-inspired color variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, InternetIdentityProvider, and react-query client.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, custom color tokens, fonts, radii, shadows, keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s current state, including features, architecture notes, image requirements, and metadata for the Bengali literary portal Amar Ghumontovilla.
